Brief Snapshot

Today’s Recommended Order

    Copy tools

    Select and copy:

    AI PLUG BUSINESS COMMAND · PARENT OS

    AI Plug Business Command

    AI Advantage First command for The AI Plug — Practical AI Adoption + Growth Systems. Classify each business lead by business type, service lane, first useful AI system, problem, awareness, and guardrail risk before outreach or build. Vertical lanes (Restaurants, Home Services, Transportation / Concierge, future niches) stay inside this command.

    Internal command center only. Copy / status / owner workflow tools — nothing sends, publishes, invoices, charges, or promises automatically.

    Restaurants are a fully built vertical lane inside the AI Plug Business Command. The dedicated Restaurant Program workflow is below.

    AI Plug Rep Daily Queue

    One queue across every vertical lane: business / contact, vertical or niche if known, diagnosed leak, suggested first offer, and next action. Restaurant rows still open the Restaurant command sheet.

    Recommended order:

    1. Needs Diagnosis
    2. Ready to Contact
    3. Discovery Needed
    4. Proposal Ready
    5. Proposal Follow-Up
    6. Verbal Yes / Deposit
    7. Won — Intake / Build
    8. Live — Recap / Renewal
    9. Vertical Opportunity / Needs Classification
    10. Not Now / Revisit

    FOLLOW-UP QUEUE

    Today’s Actions

    Start with the leads most likely to turn into real work.

    Recommended order:

    1. Hot leads
    2. Needs follow-up
    3. Ready for proposal
    4. Proposal follow-up due
    5. Waiting on reply
    6. New transportation
    7. Needs notes

    Copy only. No messages are sent automatically.

    Select and copy:

    RESTAURANT REP MODE

    Restaurant Rep Daily Queue

    Shows what a sales rep should do first today.

    Internal restaurant sales guidance only. Nothing is sent, published, invoiced, charged, or promised automatically.

    Recommended order:

    1. Research before contact
    2. Ready to contact
    3. Discovery needed
    4. Proposal ready
    5. Proposal follow-up
    6. Verbal yes / deposit next
    7. Won clients needing onboarding
    8. Not now / future follow-up

    Business Leads

    Latest operator and intake submissions. Update status and owner notes below.

    This is the main business pipeline for The AI Plug. Restaurant leads are part of the business system, but they also have a dedicated Restaurant Program workflow because that vertical is already built out.
